title: Fit test - Failing the fit test
scenario: Verify Fit Test feature on Voyager Free 60/60+ and Voyager Free 20 devices, covering pass/fail results for one or both earbuds, retry, and cancel navigation.
steps: 1. Open the Poly Lens app and navigate to the Fit Test feature for Voyager Free 60/60+ or Voyager Free 20 devices.
2. Run the fit test with both earbuds properly seated in the ears.
3. Observe the pass/fail icons and tags displayed for each earbud.
4. Run the fit test again with one earbud failing the test.
5. Observe the pass/fail icons and tags for the failing earbud.
6. Run the fit test with both earbuds failing the test.
7. Observe the pass/fail icons and tags for both earbuds.
8. Retry the fit test after a failure.
9. Cancel the fit test during the process.
10. Verify navigation back to the Device Home Screen or Onboarding upon cancel.
expected: Correct pass/fail icons and tags are displayed for each earbud. Appropriate messaging is shown for pass/fail scenarios. Canceling the fit test navigates back to the Device Home Screen or Onboarding.
